title: onosma orientalis
intro: Onosma orientalis, also known as Oriental Goldensal, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to prevent or treat various health issues. The health benefits of Onosma orientalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as liver disease and cancer. Onosma orientalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of fever and cough.
